title: Pickup three TerraYield subprojects with max parallel five
note: Three queued subproject descriptors exist under ai-tasks/parallel: backend, frontend, ops. Local five-worker runner should pick them up without exceeding max_parallel=5. Wait 20-30 minutes before writing devam et.
command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location 'C:\Users\cagda\Documents\chat_gpt_clone_1'; Write-Host 'RESULT: parallel descriptors queued'; Get-ChildItem '.\ai-tasks\parallel\terrayield-060*.json' | Select-Object Name,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize"
